## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About רכב 4u
An automotive dealership business seeking a landing page to showcase their vehicles and services. The specific brand identity, vehicle types, and unique selling points are yet to be defined.

## Target Audience
- משפחות צעירות
- חובבי רכבי יוקרה
- נוסעי קבע

## Industry
Automotive Dealership
